ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bus_stops" (
  "bus_stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bus stop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the bus stop */,
  "ward" TEXT /* Ward in which the bus stop is located */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the bus stop was installed */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* GPS latitude for the bus stop */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* GPS longitude for the bus stop */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Information about the accessibility of the bus stop */,
  "number_of_benches" INTEGER /* Number of benches at the bus stop */,
  "shelter" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the bus stop has a shelter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bus_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bus_stops_ward FOREIGN KEY ("ward") REFERENCES wards ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artworks" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork */,
  "bus_stop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the bus stop where the artwork is located */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the artwork */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the artwork was installed */,
  "artwork_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of artwork */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the artwork */,
  "materials_used" TEXT /* Materials used in the artwork */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the artwork */,
  "installation_cost" TEXT /* Cost of installing the artwork */,
  "indoors_outdoors" TEXT /* Indicates whether the artwork is indoors or outdoors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_bus_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("bus_stop_id") REFERENCES bus_stops ("bus_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_artwork_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_type_id") REFERENCES artwork_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the artist */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the artist's website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the artist */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_name" TEXT /* Name of the ward */,
  "councilor_name" TEXT /* Name of the councilor representing the ward */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the ward */,
  "area_sq_km" TEXT /* Area of the ward in square kilometers */,
  "councilor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the councilor */,
  "councilor_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the councilor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the artwork type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the artwork type */,
  "average_cost" TEXT /* Average cost of artworks of this type */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of artworks of this type in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition report */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the artwork was inspected */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition of the artwork */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "inspector_email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "inspector_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artwork_conditions_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city official, artist, public) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of how the report was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favourites" (
  "favourite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favourite */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who favourited the artwork */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork that was favourited */,
  "favourited_date" TEXT /* Date when the artwork was favourited */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason why the user favorited the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favourite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favourites_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favourites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork related to the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event took place */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the event organizer */,
  "organizer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the event organizer */,
  "organizer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the event organizer */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of people who attended the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)
